brandFull: Namma Parishkara – Bengaluru Civic AI Governance Platform

hero.subtitle: Report city issues instantly using AI. Help authorities fix potholes, garbage overflow, water leaks, and infrastructure problems faster.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Thousands of Issues Go
problem.subtitle: Bengaluru faces massive civic infrastructure challenges. Without intelligent reporting systems, critical issues remain unaddressed for weeks.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From photo to resolution — our AI streamlines the entire civic complaint process.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take a photo using your camera or upload an image of the civic problem you spot.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI instantly identifies the issue type, calculates severity, and routes to the right department.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Government departments receive alerts, track progress, and resolve issues faster with data-driven insights.

features.label: Platform Features
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools for citizens and city departments.
features.aiDetectionDesc: Upload a photo — our AI instantly identifies potholes, garbage, water leaks, and broken streetlights with 90%+ accuracy.
features.cityDashboardDesc: See all reported issues on an interactive Bengaluru map with severity indicators and live status updates.
features.autoRoutingDesc: Issues are automatically assigned to BBMP Roads, Waste Management, BWSSB, or Street Lighting departments.
features.analyticsDesc: Government departments get actionable insights with resolution tracking, trend analysis, and priority alerts.
features.trackingDesc: Track your reported issues with unique complaint IDs, status updates, and resolution timelines.
features.assistantDesc: Ask questions about civic services, departments, and complaint procedures in natural language.

impact.label: Impact Metrics
impact.title: Making Bengaluru
impact.fasterResolutionDesc: Average reduction in issue resolution time with AI-powered routing
impact.smartInfraDesc: Integrated departments for seamless civic service delivery
impact.citizenEngagementDesc: Active citizens reporting and tracking civic issues

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your City?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of citizens making Bengaluru smarter, cleaner, and more responsive.

footer.tagline: AI-powered civic intelligence platform for a smarter, cleaner Bengaluru.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Namma Parishkara. Bengaluru Civic AI Governance Platform.

reportPage.title: Report an Issue
reportPage.subtitle: Upload a photo or use your camera — our AI will detect the issue type and severity

citizenDash.subtitle: Track and manage your reported civic issues
citizenDash.noIssuesDesc: Start by reporting a civic issue in your area. Our AI will detect and categorize it automatically.
citizenDash.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this complaint?

adminDash.title: Department Dashboard
adminDash.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this complaint?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Real-time updates about your civic issues
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You'll be notified when issue statuses change

aiAssistant.title: Civic AI Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Ask about Bengaluru civic services and procedures
aiAssistant.welcomeMsg:
Hello! I'm your Namma Parishkara AI Assistant. Ask me anything about civic services, complaint procedures, or departments. For example:

- *How do I report a water leakage?*
- *Which department handles garbage complaints?*
- *What is BBMP?*
aiAssistant.rateLimited: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again in a moment.
aiAssistant.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

nearby.title: Nearby Issues
nearby.subtitle: Issues reported within {{radius}} km of your current location
nearby.locationRequiredDesc: Allow location access to see civic issues reported near you.
nearby.noIssuesDesc: No civic issues found within {{radius}} km. Try increasing the radius.

voice.title: 🎤 Voice Complaint
voice.speakNow: Speak now... describe the civic issue you are facing
voice.notSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Please use Chrome or Edge.
voice.micPermission: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access.
voice.tooShort: Please describe the issue in more detail.
voice.analyzingDesc: Extracting issue type, sentiment, urgency, and keywords
voice.analysisComplete: AI analysis complete! Issue details auto-filled.
voice.analysisFailed: AI text analysis failed. You can still fill details manually.
voice.rateLimited: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again in a moment.

voiceCall.title: AI Complaint Call Assistant
voiceCall.description: The AI assistant will ask you questions about your civic issue using voice. Speak your answers clearly in your selected language.
